allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Stop-Process -Name ngrok -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter ""Name=''node.exe''"" | Where-Object {$_.CommandLine -like ''*bridge-server*''} | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; & cmd /c ''openclaw gateway stop'' 2>&1")

hooks.command: node -e "const http=require('http');const d=JSON.stringify({channelId:'1476967208461664378',message:'Claude Code session ended.'});const r=http.request({hostname:'127.0.0.1',port:3847,path:'/notify/discord',method:'POST',headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer openclaw-bridge-default-token','Content-Type':'application/json','Content-Length':Buffer.byteLength(d)}},()=>{});r.write(d);r.end()" 2>/dev/null || true
